result: If I could change one thing, I’d make empathy the default—give every person the ability to truly see and feel what others go through. Not as a moral lecture, but as a deep, visceral understanding that would naturally guide decisions, relationships, and policies. I think a world where everyone could instantly feel the impact of their actions on others would naturally lead to more kindness, cooperation, and a genuine desire to lift each other up. It’s the one shift that would ripple into all the other improvements we dream about: justice, sustainability, peace.
